title: I-Screen Recorder Eku-inthanethi: Ngaphandle Kokuqokwa NgeMarka Yamanzi
metaDescription: I-ScreenXRecorder iyithuluzi lamahhala lokuqopha isikrini, ngaphandle kokudingeka ukuqokwa noma amamaki amanzi. Iyahambisana ne-Windows, i-macOS ne-Linux.
